title: PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW GLADSTONE PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Parent-Child Interactive Therapy (PCIT) program provides mental health assessment and treatment to children (2-7) and their families. The program involves weekly sessions and in-home practice. 18907 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: Ages 2-7 and their families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm Email (503) 496-5770 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 496-5770 Main phone Main phone (503) 496-5770 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 34 from Portland Avenue, across from Gladstone High School Services: Parent Child Interactive Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW GLADSTONE
